name: Creamy Chicken Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Use all ingredients to make a 10-inch pie crust and bake for 5 minutes at 400 degrees. Cool.
3. In a separate pan, sauté mushrooms in butter until tender. Add chicken and green onions and continue sautéing for five more minutes.
4. In a bowl, blend eggs, salt, and cream together.
5. Pour the mixture into the pie shell and sprinkle cheese evenly over the top.
6. Bake for 50 minutes at 350 degrees.
7. Serve 6 portions.
